title: Inception
overview: A skilled thief enters other people's dreams to steal secrets, but he is given a final mission that requires planting an idea instead.

title: Interstellar
overview: A team of explorers travels through a wormhole in space to search for a new home for humanity as Earth becomes less habitable.

title: Transcendence
overview: A scientist's mind is uploaded into a machine, creating an intelligence that grows beyond human control and raises ethical questions.

title: Edge of Tomorrow
overview: A soldier trapped in a time loop relives the same battle against alien invaders and gradually becomes a powerful warrior.

title: The Dark Knight
overview: Batman faces the Joker, a criminal mastermind who pushes Gotham into chaos and forces difficult moral choices.

title: The Matrix
overview: A hacker discovers that reality is a simulation and joins a rebellion against the machines controlling humanity.

title: Arrival
overview: A linguist is recruited to communicate with mysterious alien visitors whose arrival may change humanity's understanding of time.

title: Gravity
overview: Two astronauts struggle to survive after a disaster leaves them drifting in space with limited resources.

title: The Martian
overview: An astronaut stranded on Mars uses science and determination to survive while NASA works on a rescue plan.

title: Blade Runner 2049
overview: A new blade runner uncovers a hidden truth that may change society and sends him searching for a missing legend.

title: Minority Report
overview: A police officer who stops crimes before they happen becomes a suspect after being accused of a future murder.

title: Looper
overview: A hitman who eliminates targets sent from the future faces an impossible mission when his next target is his older self.

title: Oblivion
overview: A drone repair technician on a ruined Earth begins to question his mission after rescuing a mysterious woman.

title: Elysium
overview: In a future divided by class, a man takes on a mission that could bring equality between Earth and a luxurious space station.

title: Source Code
overview: A soldier repeatedly relives the final minutes before a train explosion in order to find the bomber.

title: Moon
overview: A lone worker on a lunar base nears the end of his contract and uncovers a disturbing truth about his mission and identity.

title: Passengers
overview: Two passengers wake up too early on a long space journey and must decide how to live with an irreversible mistake.

title: Tenet
overview: An agent working to prevent global catastrophe enters a world where time itself can move in reverse.

title: Dune
overview: A young nobleman is thrust into a dangerous struggle over the most valuable resource in the universe on a harsh desert planet.

title: Ex Machina
overview: A programmer is invited to test a humanoid AI and becomes trapped in a tense psychological experiment.
